zh.lifeSummary: 當Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen於1162年3月3日出生在薩辛阿赤 梅斯梅斯時，他的父親Otto 'der Reiche' von Meißen37歲，母親Hedwig von Brandenburg22歲。他於1195年與Jutta von Thüringen結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1221年2月17日在德國薩辛享年58歲，埋葬在薩辛阿赤 德累斯頓德累斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen于1162年3月3日出生在薩辛阿赤 梅斯梅斯时，他的父亲Otto 'der Reiche' von Meißen37岁，母亲Hedwig von Brandenburg22岁。他于1195年与Jutta von Thüringen结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1221年2月17日在德国薩辛享年58岁，埋葬在薩辛阿赤 德累斯頓德累斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Meißen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Dieter, Ernst.
North German and Dutch: patronymic from   Mein   1.

variants.name: Mein
meanings: German and Dutch: from the ancient Germanic personal name Maino, Meino, a short form of various compound names with the first element magin ‘strength, might’, for example Meinhardt . Compare Main 7.
German: nickname from Middle High German mein ‘mean, nasty’.

Scottish and English: perhaps a variant of Main or Meen. Meen is either a nickname from Middle English mene ‘inferior, lowly; poor; unpleasant’, from the Middle English personal name Mene (which is of uncertain origin). Alternatively, it could conceivably be a habitational name from East and West Meon (Hampshire), which take their names from the river Meon (of unexplained etymology).

nameMeanings.name: Dietrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen was born on 3 March 1162, in Meißen, Amt Meißen, Saxony, his father, Otto 'der Reiche' von Meißen, was 37 and his mother, Hedwig von Brandenburg, was 22. He married Jutta von Thüringen in 1195. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 17 February 1221, in Saxony, Germany, at the age of 58, and was buried in Dresden, Amt Dresden, Saxony.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen est né le 3 mars 1162, à Meißen, Amt Meißen, Sachsen, son père, Otto 'der Reiche' von Meißen, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Hedwig von Brandenburg, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Jutta von Thüringen en 1195. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 17 février 1221, à Sachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Dresden, Amt Dresden, Sachsen.

historicEvents.description: Am 31. März 1206 wird Dresden erstmals in einer erhaltenen Urkunde genannt: Acta sunt hec Dresdene.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen am 3. März 1162 in Meißen, Amt Meißen, Sachsen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Otto 'der Reiche' von Meißen 37 und seine Mutter Hedwig von Brandenburg 22. Er hat 1195 Jutta von Thüringen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Februar 1221 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Sachsen, Deutschland und wurde in Dresden, Amt Dresden, Sachsen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen è nato il il 3 marzo 1162 nel Meißen, Amt Meißen, Sachsen, il suo padre, Otto 'der Reiche' von Meißen, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Hedwig von Brandenburg, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Jutta von Thüringen nel 1195. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 17 febbraio 1221, nel Sachsen, Germania, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Dresden, Amt Dresden, Sachsen.

ja.lifeSummary: Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißenが1162年3月3日にサチセンアムト メイssンメイssンで生まれた時，父Otto 'der Reiche' von Meißenは37歳，母Hedwig von Brandenburgは22歳であった。1195年にJutta von Thüringenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1221年2月17日にドイツサチセンで58歳で死去し，サチセンアムト ドレスデンドレスデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen(이)가 1162년 3월 3일 작센 아트 이ss 이ss에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Otto 'der Reiche' von Meißen(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Hedwig von Brandenburg(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1195년 Jutta von Thüringen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1221년 2월 17일 독일 작센에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 작센 아트 드레즈든 드레즈든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen nasceu em 3 de março de 1162, em Meißen, Amt Meißen, Sachsen, seu pai, Otto 'der Reiche' von Meißen, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Hedwig von Brandenburg, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Jutta von Thüringen em 1195. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de fevereiro de 1221, em Sachsen, Alemanha, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Dresden, Amt Dresden, Sachsen.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen родился 3 марта 1162 г. в местности миssен, амт миssен, сачсен, его отцу по имени Otto 'der Reiche' von Meißen было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Hedwig von Brandenburg, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Jutta von Thüringen в 1195 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 17 февраля 1221 г. в местности сачсен, Германия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности дресден, амт дресден, сачсен.
